positive: A minimalist celestial forest scene, featuring highly stylized, glowing bioluminescent flora and fauna forming complex, symmetrical patterns. The composition should place a single, central majestic stag silhouette amidst delicate geometric constellations and stylized trees. The color palette is deep midnight indigo, sapphire blue, emerald green, and pops of luminous gold and teal. Focus on clean line work, strong contrasts, and flat graphic design elements blended with photorealistic bioluminescence. Ideal for a center-chest apparel print, utilizing clean negative space. Art Style: Graphic illustration meets Art Nouveau stained glass aesthetic. High contrast, vibrant colors, vector quality.
negative: blur, artifact, text, watermark, logo, copyright, celebrity, messy, lowres, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, smudges, writing, writing on canvas, cluttered background
